institution.name: The University of Texas at El Paso

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas at El Paso rose 32% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.5k → $7.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The University of Texas at El Paso rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (17.8% → 23.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at The University of Texas at El Paso rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (69.9% → 78.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at The University of Texas at El Paso rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (45.4% → 50.2%).
